> This script is deprecated and no longer maintained. It targets older WorkFlowy behavior, so it may no longer work as expected. Install only if you’re comfortable troubleshooting breakages yourself.

# WorkFlowy - Fixed Keyboard Navigation for Template Buttons [ARCHIVED] [![Install](https://img.shields.io/badge/Install-v2026.03.17-blue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/elstgav/workflowy/main/dist/scripts/archive/template-focus-navigation/workflowy.template-focus-navigation.user.js)

<sup>Gavin Elster | MIT license</sup>

Enables activating and navigating past template buttons via the keyboard.
